# Downstream Analysis

# Learning Resources

* [CUT&Tag Data Processing and Analysis Tutorial [Ye Zheng et al 2020]](https://yezhengstat.github.io/CUTTag_tutorial/)
* [Comprehensive Guide to Understanding and Using CUT&Tag Assays](https://www.activemotif.com/blog-cut-tag)
* [Epicypher's Cut&Tag Documentation](https://support.epicypher.com/docs/cut-and-tag)
* [NBIS epigenomics workshop (Advanced ChIP method tutorial)](https://nbis-workshop-epigenomics.readthedocs.io/en/latest/content/tutorials/quantitative_chip_tutorials.html)
* [Cut & Run NFcore pipeline](https://nf-co.re/cutandrun/3.2.2/)
